case_title: KATHY D PROFIT VS. CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION AND DI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFIT, KATHY D AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION AND DI GNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
